Human Xpert

Empower Your Healthcare with our BPO & Billing Solutions

ISO-Certified and HIPAA-Compliant professionals specialize in optimizing processes, reducing costs, and increasing revenues for healthcare providers worldwide.

Contact Us Optimize Your Revenue Cycle Today

Why Human Xpert Stands Out

  • 📞 24/7 Support: Inbound and outbound calls with round-the-clock assistance.
  • 🔒 HIPAA-Compliant Processes: Your data security and confidentiality are our first priorities.
  • 🏥 Specialized Expertise: Provides decades of experience across many medical specialties.
  • 🏅 ISO-Certified Excellence: A proven track record in offering reliable and secure services.

Our Healthcare BPO Services

Take a look at all our solutions designed to facilitate and streamline healthcare tasks:

Healthcare Revenue Cycle Management

Make it easier and faster to bill, collect, and reimburse.

Medical Coding Services

Code with accuracy for quicker processing and enhanced compliance.

Denial Management Services

Denials management will reduce refusal and increase money recovery.

Medical Accounts Receivable Services

Quickly tracking and collecting unpaid funds.

AI Medical Billing

Leverage cutting-edge AI for faster and smarter billing processes.

MIPS

Improve performance under Medicare's Merit-Based Incentive Payment System.

Medical Credentialing Services

Make provider credentialing easier and faster to ensure compliance and accelerate onboarding.

Delivering Real Impact

Our results speak for themselves:

99% Claim Approval Rate

Reduction in A/R Days by 30%

Up to 40% Cost Savings for Our Clients

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

Pamela Jackson

"In my 25 years of business, Human Xpert has handled my billing for my medical office for more than ten years and has proven to be the biggest and greatest billing specialist I’ve ever known."

James Brown

"Human Xpert understands coding and how to make the insurance companies work for you. They handle all the issues of billing including patient issues with ease."

Brittany Jackson

"Very professional, knowledgeable company. Their expertise in Revenue Cycle Management results in minimal rejections and quicker payment turnaround."

David Smith

"Dealing with Human Xpert has been a breeze. They are knowledgeable and reliable. Highly recommend them for billing needs."

Sarah Johnson

"Human Xpert verifying our patient’s benefits quickly and efficiently has improved our admission conversion rate. Highly recommended!"

Get In Touch

About Human Xpert

Human Xpert India Private Limited is a full-service medical billing company. It is a professional and cost-effective billing service provider for doctors, hospitals, and other medical providers in the United States. The company works with integrity and efficiency to maintain the highest level of medical billing services for its clients.
